zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Moolte於大約1078年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Moulte of Chester40歲，母親Mrs Chester Moulte37歲。她於1100年與Nicholas de Stafford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1138年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾史東享年62歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Moolte于大约1078年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Moulte of Chester40岁，母亲Mrs Chester Moulte37岁。她于1100年与Nicholas de Stafford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1138年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾史東享年62岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Moolte was born about 1078, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Moulte of Chester, was 40 and her mother, Mrs Chester Moulte, was 37. She married Nicholas de Stafford in 1100. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 1138, in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Moolte est née environ 1078, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Moulte of Chester, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mrs Chester Moulte, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Stafford en 1100. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1138, à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Moolte um 1078 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Moulte of Chester 40 und ihre Mutter Mrs Chester Moulte 37. Sie hat 1100 Nicholas de Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1138 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stone, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Moolte è nata il circa 1078 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Moulte of Chester, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mrs Chester Moulte, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Stafford nel 1100. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1138, nel Stone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Stone, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Moolteが約1078年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Moulte of Chesterは40歳，母Mrs Chester Moulteは37歳であった。1100年にNicholas de Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1138年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンで62歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Moolte(이)가 대략 1078년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Moulte of Chester(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Chester Moulte(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1100년 Nicholas de Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1138년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스톤에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Moolte nasceu aproximadamente 1078, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Moulte of Chester, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Chester Moulte, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Stafford em 1100. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1138, em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Moolte родилась около 1078 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Moulte of Chester было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Chester Moulte, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Stafford в 1100 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1138 г. в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Moolte nació aproximadamente 1078, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Moulte of Chester, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mrs Chester Moulte, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Stafford en 1100. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1138, en Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
